description_long: This object is a classic bar-style mobile phone with a black plastic body and a glossy finish. The front features a small color display screen at the top, with a physical keypad below, including a central navigation button, call buttons, and a numeric pad. The back of the phone has a single camera lens positioned near the top center, accompanied by a small speaker grille and a silver accent line. The sides of the phone are smooth and slightly curved, with minimal visible buttons or ports. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, typical of early 2000s feature phones. The phone's construction suggests a lightweight, durable device suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A compact, black bar-style mobile phone with a physical keypad, small color screen, and a single rear camera. The design is simple, glossy, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the color display, navigation button, and full numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and slight curvature of the phone's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single camera lens, speaker grille, and a silver accent line.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the phone's thin, smooth edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a basic interface with signal strength, operator name, time (11:48), and menu options such as 'Menu' and 'Names'. The background is a simple abstract wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located near the top center of the back panel, next to a small speaker grille.
attribute_button_layout: Physical keypad with 12 numeric and function buttons below the screen, a central navigation button, and two call buttons. No side buttons are visible.
